title: Merch I do not need a vinyl with the ost
display_title: Merch I do not need a vinyl with the ost
wikitext:
[]: [Merch] I do (not) need a vinyl with the ost             Quote Post by JonSuder » Tue Sep 24, 2019 4:38 am Hi, this is my first post here. I have been looking for a NGE vinyl for nearly 6 months without luck, so I have been thinking about creating one for myself. Unfortunately it turned out to be rather expensive so I am looking for people that are also interested in one so I can order a large number of copies so it gets cheaper for everyone. Thanks

[]: Re: [Merch] I do (not) need a vinyl with the ost             Quote Post by pwhodges » Tue Sep 24, 2019 1:31 pm Since you only have a digital source, and so can't claim analogue "purity"*, what benefits are you expecting? * which is bunkum anyway...

[]: Re: [Merch] I do (not) need a vinyl with the ost             Quote Post by JonSuder » Wed Sep 25, 2019 2:37 am Actually, I wanted to do some remastering on the original tracks, and it would be great to just have it on vinyl
